/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/AuthController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/DiseaseController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/HealthController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/MyHealthController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/ResidentController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/UserController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/controllers/VisitController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/dao/DiseaseDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/dao/HealthMeasurementDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/dao/ResidentDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/dao/RoleDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/dao/UserDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/dao/VisitLogDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/services/AuthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/services/DiseaseService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/services/HealthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/services/MyHealthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/services/ResidentService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/services/VisitService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_server.dir/utils/DatabaseManager.cpp.o -o community_health_server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so
